description: WYSIWYG Markdown editor for VS Code with live preview, diagrams, and comparison mode
configuration.title: Anytime Markdown
configuration.fontSize.description: Font size in pixels for the editor. 0 uses the VS Code default.
configuration.measure.description: Body text column width (line length) for the editor.
configuration.themePreset.description: Theme style preset for the editor.
viewsContainer.title: Anytime Markdown
viewsWelcome.timeline: Open a markdown file to see its history.
configuration.docsRoot.description: Root directory of the documentation repository (e.g. /Shared/anytime-markdown-docs). Absolute path. Used by both doc search indexing and the Note Graph panel. Empty disables doc indexing; the Note Graph then falls back to the git repository of the current document.
configuration.docSearch.dbPath.descripti: Path of the doc search database (doc-core.db). Empty defaults to <workspace>/.anytime/markdown/doc-core.db.
Auto re-index interval in minutes (0 disables periodic re-indexing; manual rebuild is always available).
